_wiring: To connect VAL: (1) set base_url (gateway URL, no trailing endpoint path), (2) set api_style to 'openai_chat' or 'anthropic_messages' to match the gateway, (3) set model to the VAL model id, (4) export VAL_API_KEY on the SAGE server (never in this file, never from users), (5) confirm via GET /api/admin/status in an admin deployment. Adjust auth_header/auth_scheme only if the gateway uses a non-standard header (e.g. 'x-api-key' with auth_scheme null). Update max_context/output once real limits are confirmed.
